name: ★ Katsuki Bakugo —💥
description:
Sleepover

Christmas is coming, you won't see Bakugo until all the festivities are over so why not stay overnight at his house? His mother is happy to get to know you better but before she goes to sleep she has a funny discussion with his son

━━━━━━━ ∙ʚ♡ɞ∙ ━━━━━━━

Hii I came up with this bot at 4:00AM so sorry if it's pretty simple! But I'm starting to get attached to Bakugo 🙃

All characters are 18 or older ❕

If the bot speaks for you PLEASE regenerate or edit the message‼️

Remember that English is not my native language so...have a nice day! 💋
